content.json:
## Foundry Platform/Dev Observability

Live Foundry prompt-agent telemetry from Application Insights, based on OpenTelemetry GenAI spans (`invoke_agent`, `chat`, `execute_tool`) in the dependencies table. Use the selected range to scope all charts and copy an operation_Id into Transaction Search to view end-to-end context.

content.query: let deps = dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query}; let runs = deps | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent'; let chat = deps | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'chat'; let tools = deps | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'execute_tool'; let runCount = toscalar(runs | count); union isfuzzy=true (print M='Agent runs', Value=toreal(runCount), O=1), (print M='Active agents', Value=toreal(toscalar(runs | summarize dcount(tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']))))  , O=2), (print M='Failure rate %', Value=round(toreal(toscalar(runs | summarize 100.0 * countif(success == false) / iff(count() == 0, 1, count()))), 1), O=3), (print M='p95 run latency (ms)', Value=round(toreal(toscalar(runs | summarize percentile(duration, 95))), 0), O=4), (print M='Total tokens', Value=toreal(toscalar(chat | summarize sum(coalesce(tolong(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), 0) + coalesce(tolong(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']), 0)))), O=5), (print M='Tool calls', Value=toreal(toscalar(tools | count)), O=6) | project M, Value=round(coalesce(Value, 0.0), 1), O | order by O asc
content.title: Agent health (last 24h)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | summarize runs=count() by agent | order by runs desc
content.title: Agent runs per agent

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | summarize runs=count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), agent | order by timestamp asc
content.title: Agent runs over time

content.json:
### Workload
Model (`chat`) and tool (`execute_tool`) calls that make up each agent run.

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'chat' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | summarize modelCalls=count() by agent | order by modelCalls desc
content.title: Model (chat) calls per agent

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'execute_tool' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']), tool=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.tool.name']) | where isnotempty(tool) | summarize toolCalls=count() by agent, tool | order by toolCalls desc
content.title: Tool calls (execute_tool) per agent

content.json:
### Token usage
Token counts come from `chat` (model call) spans following the OpenTelemetry GenAI conventions, summed by `gen_ai.agent.name` and `gen_ai.request.model`.

content.query: let base = dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'chat' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']), inputTokens=tolong(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), outputTokens=tolong(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | where isnotempty(agent); union (base | summarize Tokens=sum(coalesce(inputTokens, 0)) by agent | extend TokenType='Input'), (base | summarize Tokens=sum(coalesce(outputTokens, 0)) by agent | extend TokenType='Output') | project agent, TokenType, Tokens | order by agent asc
content.title: Tokens per agent (input vs output)

content.query: let base = dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'chat' | extend model=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']), inputTokens=tolong(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), outputTokens=tolong(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | where isnotempty(model); union (base | summarize Tokens=sum(coalesce(inputTokens, 0)) by model | extend TokenType='Input'), (base | summarize Tokens=sum(coalesce(outputTokens, 0)) by model | extend TokenType='Output') | project model, TokenType, Tokens | order by model asc
content.title: Tokens per model

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | summarize ['p50 (ms)']=round(percentile(duration, 50)), ['p95 (ms)']=round(percentile(duration, 95)), runs=count() by agent | order by ['p95 (ms)'] desc
content.title: Agent run latency p50/p95 (ms)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'chat' | summarize p50=round(percentile(duration, 50)), p95=round(percentile(duration, 95)) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
content.title: Model (chat) latency over time (ms)

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | extend Op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where Op in ('invoke_agent', 'chat', 'execute_tool') | summarize Count=count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), Op | order by timestamp asc
content.title: GenAI operation volume over time

content.query: dependencies | where timestamp {TimeRange:query} | where tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) == 'invoke_agent' | extend agent=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | summarize runs=count(), failures=countif(success == false) by agent | extend ['failure %']=round(100.0 * failures / runs, 1) | order by failures desc, runs desc
content.title: Errors by agent (invoke_agent)

content.query: dependencies | where success == false | project timestamp, call=name, target, resultCode, duration_ms=duration, operation_Id | order by timestamp desc | take 50
content.title: Failed dependency calls (all dependencies, not only agent spans)

content.query: exceptions | project timestamp, type, method, outerMessage, operation_Id | order by timestamp desc | take 50
content.title: Recent exceptions

content.query: union isfuzzy=true (requests | project timestamp, request=name, resultCode, duration_ms=duration, success, operation_Id), (traces | project timestamp, request=message, resultCode='', duration_ms=real(null), success=true, operation_Id) | order by timestamp desc | take 100
content.title: Recent operations

content.query: union (dependencies | extend Kind='dependency'), (requests | extend Kind='request'), (traces | extend Kind='trace'), (exceptions | extend Kind='exception') | where operation_Id == '{SelectedOp}' | extend What = coalesce(column_ifexists('name', ''), column_ifexists('message', ''), column_ifexists('type', '')) | project timestamp, Kind, What, target=column_ifexists('target', ''), duration_ms=column_ifexists('duration', real(null)), resultCode=tostring(column_ifexists('resultCode', '')) | order by timestamp asc
content.title: Transaction details
